'Drives the funnel cards' rewritten to 'Powers the funnel cards'. Banned-verb grep across alp/, index.html, catalog/index.html returns clean.
'5 leads in GJ cluster on the dashboard at launch' rewritten to 'Live data captured for the GJ-cluster pilot · including TEST leads from UAT'. No longer overclaims pilot density.

All 10 §06A Phase 2 items recoloured from 'Build' (amber) to 'Planned' (grey pill-phase2). Section intro reworded to 'scoped, sequenced, not yet started (per plan Sheet 2)'. Hero stat tile updated 'Phase 2 build' → 'Phase 2 plan'.
Hero subhead tightened from 41 → 27 words. Phase 2 paragraph also restructured for scannability.

findings_remaining.issue: §07 Sources block exists. Per tone-of-voice §3 carve-out, justified because page combines 3 distinct artefacts (PRD + project plan + screenshots PDF).
§03 Lead lifecycle deviates from canonical §03 = Architecture. Documented as override D7 in spec §9.

strengths: Cross-page consistency now closed end-to-end: home card, IP catalog row, and the page itself all carry the same MVP-live framing with the corrected 'Asset Lifecycle Platform' name.
Phase 2 pill recolour (Build → Planned, amber → grey) is a small honesty-register win — visible now the page does not overclaim active development on items the plan says are Not Started.
Source-citation in §01 Problem card ('PRD §Lead Creation') sets a precedent worth porting back to other pages — inline source cites at the bullet level beat aggregated §08 Sources blocks.
All 7 fixes mechanical and reversible; no structural rework required between v0.9.0 audit pass 1 and pass 2.
ship_readiness: Page is publishable. No CRITICAL or HIGH findings remain. Three MEDIUM/LOW items are accepted exceptions. Recommend marking spec status to 'shipped'.
